name: BuildingMeshes
description: Extrudes a list of building footprints by their heights.

inputParameters.name: buildingFootprints
inputParameters.description: Tree of building footprint polygons. Holes are auto-detected by containment.

inputParameters.name: buildingHeights
inputParameters.description: Tree of building heights matching buildingFootprints tree structure.

outputParameters.name: groundFaces
outputParameters.description: Ground faces with holes (ngon). One mesh per building.

outputParameters.name: lateralFaces
outputParameters.description: Lateral wall faces. One mesh per building.

outputParameters.name: rooftopFaces
outputParameters.description: Rooftop faces with holes (ngon). One mesh per building.
